source.title: DOMAGOJ DELAČ-Uopće nisam skužio Ed Sheerana.Ti ćeš meni ručat! PODCAST ČUŠPAJZ #135

summary.title_hr: DOMAGOJ DELAČ-Uopće nisam skužio Ed Sheerana.Ti ćeš meni ručat! PODCAST ČUŠPAJZ #135
summary.abstract_hr: Domagoj Delač, poduzetnik i 'gastro ambasador', dijeli svoje bogato iskustvo od marketinga i ugostiteljstva do stvaranja viralnog fenomena 'Mljevenika' i platforme Best Food Croatia. Razgovor obuhvaća njegove avanture u Irskoj, kritički osvrt na hrvatsku gastronomsku scenu i izazove radne snage, te njegovu ulogu koordinatora volontera nakon potresa u Petrinji. Delač također otkriva svoje političke ambicije i naglašava važnost pozitivnog pristupa u poslovanju i životu, najavljujući buduće goste svoje emisije.
key_points: Domagoj Delač je osnivač platforme Best Food Croatia i 'gastro ambasador' koji promovira vrhunske restorane u Hrvatskoj na opušten i pristupačan način.
Njegov proizvod 'Mljevenici', reinterpretacija ćevapčića s dodanim janjećim glojem, postao je viralni marketinški hit koji je privukao medijsku pažnju diljem regije.
Delač je radio u Irskoj u hotelu s pet zvjezdica, gdje je napredovao do menadžerske pozicije i susreo poznate osobe poput Eda Sheerana (kojeg nije prepoznao) i Schillinger iz serije Oz.
Kritizira nedostatak kvalitete u nekim hrvatskim restoranima unatoč visokim cijenama, naglašavajući da Hrvatska ima potencijal za vrhunsku gastronomiju zbog bogatstva namirnica i kulturnog nasljeđa.
Ističe problem nedostatka pouzdane radne snage u ugostiteljstvu u Hrvatskoj, uspoređujući ga s pozitivnim iskustvima rada s radnicima iz Bangladeša i Filipina u inozemstvu.
Bio je glavni koordinator volontera u Petrinji nakon potresa, gdje je organizirao pomoć i doživio viralni trenutak s izjavom 'Ti ćeš meni ručat!'
Izražava dugoročnu želju za bavljenjem politikom, vođen željom da pomogne zajednici, ali je svjestan izazova i rizika koje to nosi.
Najavljuje buduće goste svoje emisije, uključujući bivšu premijerku Jadranku Kosor, s kojom je već snimio epizodu.
summary.title_en: DOMAGOJ DELAČ-I didn't get Ed Sheeran at all. You will eat lunch! PODCAST ČUŠPAJZ #135
summary.abstract_en: Domagoj Delač, entrepreneur and 'gastro ambassador', shares his rich experience from marketing and hospitality to the creation of the viral phenomenon 'Mljevenika' and the Best Food Croatia platform. The conversation covers his adventures in Ireland, a critical review of the Croatian gastronomic scene and workforce challenges, and his role as volunteer coordinator after the earthquake in Petrinja. Delač also reveals his political ambitions and emphasizes the importance of a positive approach in business and life, announcing future guests of his show.
key_points_en: Domagoj Delač is the founder of the Best Food Croatia platform and a 'gastro ambassador' who promotes top restaurants in Croatia in a relaxed and accessible way.
His product 'Mljevenici', a reinterpretation of ćevapčići with added lamb fat, became a viral marketing hit which attracted media attention throughout the region.
Delač worked in Ireland in a five-star hotel, where he advanced to a managerial position and met famous people like Ed Sheeran (whom he did not recognize) and Schillinger from the series Oz.

Criticizes the lack of quality in some Croatian restaurants despite high prices, emphasizing that Croatia has the potential for top-tier gastronomy due to the richness of ingredients and cultural heritage.
Highlights the problem of the lack of reliable workforce in hospitality in Croatia, comparing it with positive experiences of working with workers from Bangladesh and the Philippines abroad.
He was the main coordinator of volunteers in Petrinja after the earthquake, where he organized aid and experienced a viral moment with the statement 'You will eat lunch!'
Expresses a long-term desire for engaging in politics, led by the desire to help the community, but is aware of the challenges and risks that this carries.
He announces future guests of his show, including former prime minister Jadranka Kosor, with whom he has already recorded an episode.
